channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [TNPETRO] Tamilnadu Petroproducts Ltd Revises Project Cost for LAB and HCD Plant Expansion
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Tamilnadu Petroproducts Ltd has announced a revision in the project cost for the expansion of its LAB and HCD plants. The LAB plant's project cost has been revised from X 310 Crore to X 365 Crore, while the HCD plant's project cost has been revised from X 214 Crore to X 237 Crore. The revision is due to escalation in cost including foreign exchange fluctuations and other incidental factors. The company also plans to set up 2 downstream units in the HCD Plant at an estimated cost of X 90 Crore. These units are expected to be completed within 18 months upon receipt of regulatory and other requisite approvals. The funding for these projects will be met from internal accruals and borrowings based on the business conditions at the time of implementation.

  • Revision in project cost for LAB plant from X 310 Crore to X 365 Crore
  • Revision in project cost for HCD plant from X 214 Crore to X 237 Crore
  • Setting up of 2 downstream units in the HCD Plant at an estimated cost of X 90 Crore
  • Funding for these projects to be met from internal accruals and borrowings
  • Expected completion within 18 months upon receipt of regulatory approvals

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TAMILNADU PETROPRODUCTS LTD. | Category: Project Update

item.title: [CONFINT] Longspur International Ventures Approves Preferential Issue of 2,03,50,000 Equity Shares for Cash
item.description:
Longspur International Ventures Ltd. announced that its Board of Directors, at their meeting held on 10th March, 2026, inter alia, considered and approved the revision in the preferential issue of equity shares. The Board has now approved the issuance of up to 2,03,50,000 Equity Shares of face value Rs.10/- each for cash at a price of Rs.10/- per Equity Share, to certain Promoter and Non-Promoter investors on a preferential basis. The proposed allotment is done in the interest of the company, its existing and prospective investors and for the furtherance of its business. The necessary details and disclosures regarding the aforesaid revision shall be provided in the Explanatory Statement forming part of the Notice of the Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) to be convened for seeking shareholders’ approval.

  • Longspur International Ventures to issue 2,03,50,000 equity shares on a preferential basis
  • Issue price set at Rs.10/- per equity share
  • Investment to be used for the furtherance of the company's business
  • Shareholders' approval sought for the preferential issue
  • Detailed disclosures to be provided in the EGM notice

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Confidence Finance And Trading Limited | Category: Investment

item.title: [CONFINT] Longspur International Ventures Ltd. Approves Preferential Issue of Equity Shares Worth ₹20,35,00,000
item.description:
Longspur International Ventures Ltd. held a Board of Directors meeting on 10th March, 2026, where they considered and approved several key decisions. The Board revised the preferential issue size from ₹15,00,00,000 to ₹20,35,00,000, approved the allotment of shares to promoter and non-promoter entities, and decided to issue up to 2,03,50,000 equity shares at a price of ₹10/- each. The company will convene an Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) on 6th April, 2026, to seek shareholder approval for the preferential issue. The Board also approved the draft notice of the EGM and the book closure for the purpose of the EGM.

  • Revision in preferential issue size from ₹15,00,00,000 to ₹20,35,00,000
  • Approval of proposed allottees for share allotment
  • Issue of up to 2,03,50,000 equity shares at ₹10/- each
  • Convening of Extraordinary General Meeting on 6th April, 2026
  • Approval of EGM notice and book closure

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Confidence Finance And Trading Limited | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [CUBEINVIT] Cube Highways Trust Re-Appoints Ms. Fereshte Dhunjishaw Sethna as Independent Director for a Second Term
item.description:
Cube Highways Trust has announced the re-appointment of Ms. Fereshte Dhunjishaw Sethna as an Independent Director for a second term of 3 (three) consecutive years, commencing from March 16, 2026 to March 15, 2029. The decision was made at the Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) held on March 10, 2026, following the recommendation of the Nomination & Remuneration Committee and Board of Directors of the Company. The re-appointment is in line with the applicable provisions of SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014, and Regulation 51 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Cube Highways Trust re-appoints Ms. Fereshte Dhunjishaw Sethna as an Independent Director for a second term.
  • The re-appointment is for a period of 3 (three) consecutive years, from March 16, 2026 to March 15, 2029.
  • The decision was made at the Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) held on March 10, 2026.
  • The re-appointment is in accordance with the SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014, and Regulation 51 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
  • Ms. Sethna's re-appointment was approved by the Nomination & Remuneration Committee and Board of Directors of the Company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cube Highways Trust | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KESAR] Kesar India Ltd Subsidiary, Kesar Middle East - FZCO, Dubai, Acquires 99% Shares of Newly Incorporated Oriole Trading FZ-LLC in Ras Al Khaimah, UAE
item.description:
Kesar India Ltd, through its wholly owned subsidiary Kesar Middle East - FZCO, Dubai, has incorporated a step-down subsidiary, Oriole Trading FZ-LLC, in Ras Al Khaimah, UAE. Kesar Middle East - FZCO has subscribed to 99 shares of AED 500 each, acquiring 99% shares of Oriole Trading FZ-LLC. Oriole Trading FZ-LLC, incorporated on February 27, 2026, is yet to commence its business operations. This acquisition is aimed to expand Kesar India Ltd's business.

  • Kesar India Ltd's subsidiary, Kesar Middle East - FZCO, Dubai, incorporates a step-down subsidiary, Oriole Trading FZ-LLC, in Ras Al Khaimah, UAE
  • Kesar Middle East - FZCO subscribes to 99 shares of AED 500 each, acquiring 99% shares of Oriole Trading FZ-LLC
  • Oriole Trading FZ-LLC is incorporated on February 27, 2026, and is yet to commence its business operations
  • This acquisition is aimed to expand Kesar India Ltd's business
  • Oriole Trading FZ-LLC is in the trading of Computer Equipment, Electronic Devices and related requisites

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kesar India Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [GALACTICO] Galactico Corporate Services Ltd Schedules Board Meeting to Review Business Activities and Compliance
item.description:
Galactico Corporate Services Ltd has informed the BSE that a meeting of the Board of Directors is scheduled on 13/03/2026. The meeting will be held through video conferencing/Other Audio - Visual means (OAVM) and will transact several businesses. These include reviewing the preliminary assessment of the non-core business activities, maintaining the liquid net worth, complying with capital adequacy and net worth norms, and examining the feasibility of conducting non-SEBI regulated activities through a separate business unit.

  • Galactico Corporate Services Ltd has scheduled a Board Meeting on 13/03/2026
  • The meeting will be held through video conferencing/Other Audio - Visual means (OAVM)
  • The Board will review the preliminary assessment of the non-core business activities
  • The Company will maintain the liquid net worth in compliance with regulatory requirements
  • The Board will ensure continued compliance with the applicable regulatory framework

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Galactico Corporate Services Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NETLINK] Netlink Solutions India Ltd. Appoints New Directors and Approves Inter-Corporate Loans
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Netlink Solutions India Ltd. has announced the appointment of Mr. Viren Bakraniya as an Additional Director (Non-Executive Non-Independent) and Mrs. Kajal Baldha as an Additional Director (Executive) and Whole-Time Director (WTD). The appointments were made during the process of a change in control and management of the Company in connection with an open offer made by Acquirers under the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The Company has also approved granting of inter-corporate loans up to Rs. 30,00,00,000 (Rupees Thirty Crores only).

  • Appointment of Mr. Viren Bakraniya as an Additional Director (Non-Executive Non-Independent)
  • Appointment of Mrs. Kajal Baldha as an Additional Director (Executive) and Whole-Time Director (WTD)
  • Acquirers have made an open offer under the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
  • The Company has approved granting of inter-corporate loans up to Rs. 30,00,00,000

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NETLINK SOLUTIONS (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [CGCL] Capri Global Capital Ltd. Approves Fund Raising Through Non-Convertible Debentures
item.description:
Capri Global Capital Ltd. has approved the raising of funds through the issuance of Redeemable, Rated, Secured, Listed Non-Convertible Debentures ('Debentures'). The Board of Directors, at its meeting held on March 10, 2026, considered and approved the raising of funds. The Details as required under SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 are set out in Annexure A. The company can issue up to 2,00,00,000 Secured, Rated, Listed Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures of face value 1,000 each, aggregating up to 2,000 crore. The issue will be listed on BSE Limited. The tenure of the instrument, coupon/interest, and charge/security are yet to be finalized.

  • Capri Global Capital Ltd. approved the raising of funds through Non-Convertible Debentures
  • The company can issue up to 2,00,00,000 Secured, Rated, Listed Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures
  • The face value of each debenture is 1,000 and the overall issue size is up to 2,000 crore
  • The debentures will be listed on BSE Limited
  • The tenure, coupon/interest, and charge/security are yet to be finalized

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Capri Global Capital Limited | Category: Investment

item.title: [DECCAN] Deccan Health Care Ltd: Resignation of Two Independent Directors
item.description:
Deccan Health Care Ltd announced the resignation of two non-executive independent directors, Ms. Samhitha Kandlakunta and Ms. Karishma Patel, with effect from 9th March 2026 and 10th March 2026 respectively. The board appreciated their contributions and support during their tenure.

  • Resignation of Ms. Samhitha Kandlakunta as Non-Executive Independent Director
  • Resignation of Ms. Karishma Patel as Non-Executive Independent Director
  • Both resignations are due to personal reasons
  • The board appreciates their contributions and support

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Deccan Health Care Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KRATOSENER] Lords Mark Industries Ltd partners with C-MET for AI-Powered Radiation-Free Breast Cancer Detection Wearable
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Lords Mark Industries Ltd has entered into a Technology Transfer Agreement (TTA) with the Centre for Materials for Electronic Technology (C-MET) for the manufacturing and commercialization of an AI-powered, radiation-free wearable device for early detection of breast cancer. The device, which utilizes high-precision thermal sensors and AI-driven temperature mapping, is non-invasive, painless, and eliminates radiation exposure. The global breast cancer diagnostics market is projected to reach approximately USD 12.88 billion by 2035, and this partnership positions the Company at the forefront of the indigenous Med-Tech sector. The product is expected to be available for commercial use globally by the end of the current calendar year.

  • Lords Mark Industries Ltd has partnered with C-MET for the manufacturing and commercialization of an AI-powered, radiation-free breast cancer detection wearable.
  • The device utilizes high-precision thermal sensors and AI-driven temperature mapping to detect early-stage abnormalities in a non-invasive and radiation-free manner.
  • The global breast cancer diagnostics market is projected to reach approximately USD 12.88 billion by 2035, and this partnership aims to position the Company at the forefront of the indigenous Med-Tech sector.
  • The product is expected to be available for commercial use globally by the end of the current calendar year.
  • This collaboration integrates C-MET’s scientific expertise with Lords Mark’s manufacturing strength, enabling a new paradigm in preventive diagnostics.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KRATOS ENERGY & INFRASTRUCTURE LTD. | Category: New Launch
